name: Alchemist
description: A brilliant status-effect specialist who hurls volatile concoctions. Low HP but high intelligence; rewards creative use of conditions.

abilities.name: Acid Flask
abilities.description: Hurl a vial of corrosive acid that deals damage and leaves a burning DoT.

abilities.name: Smoke Bomb
abilities.description: Deploy a smoke cloud. +4 defense for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Experimental Vial
abilities.description: Throw a volatile compound — hits twice with unpredictable impact.
